_about: Canonical Bible knowledge model (platform ontology). IDs are stable infrastructure; display names are localization. See docs/BIBLE_KNOWLEDGE_MODEL_INVARIANTS.md. Additive only.

genesis.author: moses
genesis.date_note: Composition traditional; narrated events span creation to c. 1800 BC.

exodus.author: moses
major_events: giving of the law at sinai

deuteronomy.author: moses
deuteronomy.authorship_note: Traditionally attributed to Moses; the account of his death (ch. 34) is editorial.
